title: aeschynomene nodulosa
intro: Aeschynomene nodulosa, also known as the sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the legume family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aeschynomene nodulosa include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are often used to extract its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
